EPCAM._method: log1p(nCPM*6000/1e6)->Glassman(0.7768,3.9723); anchor=max nCPM over HPA celltypes per lineage; EPCAM is an epithelial carcinoma TAA (catumaxomab/solitomab target) -> TAA-class restriction applied (cf. hpa_ihc_anchor.py): keep Epithelial anchor only, all non-epithelial lineages floored to _default (IHC0=9360). EPCAM has NO HPA immune/endothelial/blood single-cell expression; the only non-epithelial HPA signal is Oocytes (germ cell->'Other', 819.7 nCPM=225670.9 copies) which is floored to avoid leaking EpCAM onto cardiomyocyte/neuron 'Other' cells (fake on-target-off-tumor toxicity).

sources.gene: EPCAM (TACSTD1, CD326, EGP-2/EGP40, GA733-2, TROP1, KSA, ESA, MK-1, 17-1A)
sources.hpa_release_source_file: proteinatlas.tsv (official HPA bulk download, col 'RNA single cell type specific nCPM')
sources.hpa_blood_nTPM: not detected (field empty for EPCAM) -> no immune/blood lineage expression
sources.hpa_cancer_pTPM: not reported as specific (field empty) -> pan-carcinoma, not lineage-restricted
sources.conversion: idx = ln(1 + nCPM*6000/1e6);  copies/cell = 10^(3.9723 + 0.7768*idx). (0.7768, 3.9723) = least-squares fit of log10(Glassman&Balthasar 2016 ladder {IHC0:9.36e3, IHC1:6.46e4, IHC2:2.55e5, IHC3:2.30e6}) vs IHC index {0,1,2,3}. Reproduces existing noihc_ncpm_anchor.json values (FLT3, FCRL5, TNFRSF9) to the decimal.

raw_hpa_per_lineage_before_TAA_restricti.note: Unrestricted method would emit Other=225670.9 copies from Oocytes (819.7 nCPM). Floored to _default in the emitted entry because the ABM 'Other' label is a catch-all (cardiomyocytes/neurons/adipocytes/germ cells) and EpCAM is germ-cell/epithelial-specific, not expressed on cardiomyocytes or neurons.

cross_check_literature.metric: absolute EpCAM surface copies/cell on carcinoma (QIFIKIT / calibrated flow cytometry)
cross_check_literature.citation: Sapski S, Beha N, Kontermann RE, Müller D. 'Influence of antigen density and immunosuppressive factors on tumor-targeted costimulation with antibody-fusion proteins and bispecific antibody-mediated T cell response.' Cancer Immunology, Immunotherapy. 2020;69(11):2291-2303. doi:10.1007/s00262-020-02624-6. EpCAM surface density measured by DAKO QIFIKIT (K007811-8).
cross_check_literature.comparison_to_HPA_anchor: HPA-derived Epithelial anchor = 1535415 copies/cell (from normal colonocytes, the highest-nCPM EpCAM epithelium). QIFIKIT colon-carcinoma lines measure ~591,000-769,000 EpCAM/cell -> same order of magnitude (10^5-10^6); HPA anchor is ~2x above the carcinoma-line measurements (consistent: normal colonocyte is peak-physiological EpCAM). For a CRC-specific model the modeler may prefer the QIFIKIT carcinoma value ~6-7.7e5; per instruction the HPA value is retained as the anchor and this is reported as a cross-check.

_provenance.anchor_type: HPA single-cell nCPM -> Glassman ladder (Path B / no-IHC), TAA-restricted
